## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Katya Luscomb's potential role as Technical Managing Editor at GrowthX, exploring her background, motivations, and cultural fit.](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Katya values intellectual curiosity, problem-solving, and continuous skill development in her career](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes agency, customer empathy, and delivering impactful results beyond just completing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Katya's experience spans content creation, AI analytics, and project management, with a desire for more meaningful contributions](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in balancing risk-taking and innovation with maintaining customer trust and quality output](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Culture and Values

  - [Emphasis on agency and intellectual curiosity](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Focus on impacting things that matter to customers, not just completing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Building empathy and trust with clients](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Importance of caring about output and helping customers win](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

### Katya's Career Goals and Motivations

  - [Seeking to combine content creation with analytical/process thinking](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Desire to apply project management skills in a more meaningful way](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Looking for opportunities to learn new skills and grow professionally](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Values problem-solving, teaching others, and contributing to team growth](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### Work Style and Preferences

  - [Balances heads-down work with stakeholder interactions](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Prioritizes building trust through reliable delivery and open communication](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Enjoys finding innovative solutions to streamline processes (e.g., using regular expressions)](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Seeks opportunities to mentor and share knowledge with colleagues](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### AI and LLM Experience

  - [Worked on training AI models and content analytics](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Noticed significant improvements in LLMs' research capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Uses deep research queries to kickstart technical writing projects](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Recognizes the importance of human judgment in verifying AI-generated information](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Approach to Failure and Innovation

  - [GrowthX distinguishes between internal risk-taking and customer-facing quality](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Encourages internal experimentation and learning from failures](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Emphasizes building trust with customers to allow for more innovative approaches](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Balances creativity (e.g., rewriting content in character voices) with maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Skill Development in AI

  - [GrowthX shares knowledge through external workshops and internal standardization](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Encourages team members to consume educational content produced by the company](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Filters new tools and techniques to avoid overwhelming team with every "shiny new toy"](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Recognizes the need for more structured learning opportunities for team members](https://fathom.video/share/5Ny95QxzeR_H3SWd1fYiKYz9nXVjtt1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

## Next Steps

  - Await feedback on Katya's potential role at GrowthX
  - Consider implementing more structured learning opportunities for team members to stay updated on AI advancements
  - Explore ways to encourage experimentation and learning while maintaining focus on customer deliverables
  - Continue discussions on balancing innovation with maintaining customer trust and quality standards
